summary.para: Filter Explore.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器探查
Estimate the filter order based on the numerator coefficients and the denominator coefficients.
Chinese Simplified：根据分子系数和分母系数估算滤波器阶数
Determine whether the filter has a minimum phase.
Chinese Simplified：判断滤波器是否有最小相位
Determine whether the filter has a maximum phase.
Chinese Simplified：判断滤波器是否有最大相位
Determine whether the filter is stable.
Chinese Simplified：判断滤波器是否稳定
Determine whether the roots of the polynomial coefficients are all inside the unit circle.
Chinese Simplified：判断多项式系数的根是否都在单位圆内
Determine whether it is a FIR filter.
Chinese Simplified：判断是否为FIR滤波器
Determine if the filter is in linear phase.
Chinese Simplified：判断滤波器是否是线性相位

summary.para: FIRAnalysis.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器分析
FIRAnalysis.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器分析
Calculate the frequency response of the FIR digital filter at specified frequency points.
Chinese Simplified：计算FIR数字滤波器在指定频点的频率响应。

param.name: f
param.para: Chinese Simplified：指定的频率点数组

summary.para: Calculate the frequency response of an FIR digital filter
Chinese Simplified：计算FIR数字滤波器的频率响应

param.name: whole
param.para: When it's false, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate/2; when it's true, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate.
Chinese Simplified：false时频率点范围是0-sampleRate/2，true时频率点范围是0-sampleRate

summary.para: Calculate the group delay of the FIR filter. The group delay of an n-th order linear phase FIR filter is n/2.
Chinese Simplified：计算FIR滤波器的群延迟，n阶线性相位FIR滤波器的群延迟为n/2

param.name: whole
param.para: When it's false, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate/2; when it's true, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate.
Chinese Simplified：false时频率点范围是0~sampleRate/2，true时频率点范围是0~sampleRate。

returns.para: gd is a group delay array, the unit is Samples, f is the frequency point array, the unit is the same as fs, the default is radians/sample.
Chinese Simplified： gd是群延迟数组，单位是Samples， w是对应的频率点数组，单位和fs相同，默认为radians/sample

summary.para: Calculate the amplitude frequency characteristic (in dB) and phase frequency characteristic (in degrees) of a continuous-time system.
Chinese Simplified：计算连续时间系统的幅频特性（单位dB）和相频特性（单位度）。
Calculate the phase response of the digital filter in radians.
Chinese Simplified：计算数字滤波器的相位响应，单位是弧度

param.name: whole
param.para: When it's false, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate/2; when it's true, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate.
Chinese Simplified：false时频率点范围是0-sampleRate/2，true时频率点范围是0-sampleRate

summary.para: Calculate the zero-phase response of the filter.
Chinese Simplified：计算滤波器的零相位响应

param.name: whole
param.para: When it's false, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate/2; when it's true, the frequency range is 0 to sampleRate.
Chinese Simplified：false时频率点范围是0-sampleRate/2，true时频率点范围是0-sampleRate

summary.para: Calculate the impulse response of the digital filter.
Chinese Simplified：计算数字滤波器的冲击响应
Calculate the step response of the digital filter.
Chinese Simplified：计算数字滤波器的阶跃响应
FIRDesign.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器设计
FIRDesign.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器设计
FIRDesign.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器设计
FIRDesign.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器设计
FIRDesign.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器设计
FIRDesign.
Chinese Simplified： FIR滤波器设计
Design a linear phase multiband FIR filter using the least square method ， so that its frequency response is closest to the specified frequency band and gain description.
Chinese Simplified：使用最小二乘法设计线性相位多频带FIR滤波器，使其频率响应最接近于指定的频带和增益描述

param.name: n
param.para: The filter order, equal to the coefficient +1, must be even.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器阶数，等于系数+1，必须是偶数

param.name: bands
param.para: Monotonically increasing band edge frequency in the range [0, sampleRate/2] and must be even in length.
Chinese Simplified：单调递增的频带边沿频率，范围是[0, sampleRate/2]，长度必须是偶数

param.name: amplitudes
param.para: The ideal amplitude and length of each frequency ，which is equal to that of bands.
Chinese Simplified：每个频点的理想幅度，长度和bands相等

param.name: weight
param.para: The relative weight of each band, and the array length is half of the bands.
Chinese Simplified：每个频带的相对权重，数组长度是bands的一半

param.name: sampleRate
param.para: Samplerate,The unit is Hz. The default value is 2Hz.
Chinese Simplified：采样率，单位为Hz，默认为2Hz

summary.para: Design a linear-phase multiband FIR filter using constrained least squares method, so that its frequency response is closest to the specified band and gain specifications..
Chinese Simplified： 使用约束最小二乘法设计线性相位多频带FIR滤波器，使其频率响应最接近于指定的频带和增益描述

param.name: n
param.para: The filter order, which is equal to the length of coefficients minus 1, must be an even number. If it is an odd number, it will automatically be incremented by 1..
Chinese Simplified：滤波器阶数，等于系数长度-1，必须是偶数，如果是奇数会自动加1

param.name: bands
param.para: The monotonically increasing edge frequencies of the bands, ranging from [0, sampleRate/2], must have an even number of elements..
Chinese Simplified：单调递增的频带边沿频率，范围是[0, sampleRate/2]，长度必须是偶数

param.name: amplitudes
param.para: The ideal gain at each frequency point, whose length is equal to the number of bands minus 1, corresponds to the length of the bands array minus 1.
Chinese Simplified：每个频点的理想增益，长度等于频带数量，也就是bands的长度-1

param.name: upperBounds
param.para: The maximum ripple for each band, in linear units, must have a length equal to the number of amplitudes specified for those bands.
Chinese Simplified：每个频带的最大纹波，线性单位，长度和amplitudes相等

param.name: lowerBounds
param.para: The minimum ripple for each band, in linear units, must have a length equal to the number of amplitudes specified for those bands.
Chinese Simplified：每个频带的最小纹波，线性单位，长度和amplitudes相等

param.name: sampleRate
param.para: Samplerate,The unit is Hz. The default value is 2Hz.
Chinese Simplified：采样率，单位为Hz，默认为2Hz

member.name: M:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.FIRDesign.Frefine(MathNet.Numerics.LinearAlgebra.Vector{System.Double},MathNet.Numerics.LinearAlgebra.Vector{System.Double},MathNet.Numerics.LinearAlgebra.Vector{System.Double})
member.summary: refine local minima and maxima of H using Newton's method

member.name: M:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.FIRDesign.CheckFIR_LeastSquare(System.Int32,System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double)
member.summary: 检查FIR最小二乘法设计法的输入参数

member.name: M:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.FIRDesign.CheckFIR_ConstrainedLeastSquare(System.Int32,System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double)
member.summary: 检查FIR约束最小二乘法设计法的输入参数

summary.para: FIR filter Kaiser window order estimation, returning the filter order, normalized cutoff frequency, and beta parameter that meet the design parameter requirements..
Chinese Simplified：FIR滤波器Kaiser窗阶估计，返回满足设计参数要求的滤波器阶数、归一化截止频率和beta参数

param.name: frequency
param.para: Monotonically increasing band edge frequencies, which must lie between 0 and sampleRate/2, and the length must be even..
Chinese Simplified：单调递增的频带边沿频率，必须在0~sampleRate/2之间，长度必须是偶数

param.name: amplitude
param.para: The ideal amplitude at each frequency point, with a length equal to (bands.len + 2) / 2, and the transition bands are not specified.
Chinese Simplified：每个频点的理想幅度，长度等于(bands.len + 2) / 2，过渡带不指定

param.name: ripple
param.para: The maximum ripple for each frequency band, with a range of (0,1), where the length and amplitudes are equal..
Chinese Simplified：每个频带的最大纹波，范围是(0,1)，长度和amplitudes相等

param.name: sampleRate
param.para: Samplerate,The unit is Hz. The default value is 2Hz.
Chinese Simplified：采样率，单位为Hz，默认为2Hz

param.name: scale
param.para: Ripple scale, default is linear scale, range is (0,1).
Chinese Simplified：纹波标度，默认是线性标度，范围是(0,1)

returns.para: Chinese Simplified：n：满足设计要求的最低滤波器阶数； wn：归一化截止频率，范围是[0,1]，其中1对应奈奎斯特频率频率fs/2； beta：Kaise窗的形状因子，用于控制窗函数的主瓣宽度和旁瓣衰减； bandType：FIR滤波器频带类型

summary.para: Low-pass FIR filter Kaiser window order estimation, returning the filter order and beta parameter that meet the design parameter requirements.
Chinese Simplified：低通FIR滤波器Kaiser窗阶估计，返回满足设计参数要求的滤波器阶数和beta参数

param.name: wp
param.para: Chinese Simplified：归一化通带边沿频率

param.name: ws
param.para: Chinese Simplified：归一化阻带边沿频率

param.name: rp
param.para: Chinese Simplified：最大通带纹波，线性单位，范围是(0,1)

param.name: rs
param.para: Chinese Simplified：最大阻带纹波，线性单位，范围是(0,1)

summary.para: Using the Parks-McClellan algorithm to estimate the minimum order of an equiripple FIR filter that meets the design parameter requirements.
Chinese Simplified：使用Parks-McClellan算法估计满足设计参数要求的等波纹FIR滤波器的最低阶数

param.name: frequency
param.para: The monotonically increasing band edge frequencies must lie between 0 and sampleRate/2, and the length of these frequencies must be even.
Chinese Simplified：单调递增的频带边沿频率，必须在0~sampleRate/2之间，长度必须是偶数

param.name: amplitude
param.para: The ideal amplitude at each frequency point, with a length equal to (bands.len + 2) / 2, and the transition bands are unspecified.
Chinese Simplified：每个频点的理想幅度，长度等于(bands.len + 2) / 2，过渡带不指定

param.name: ripple
param.para: The maximum ripple of each band, the range is in (0,1) and the length is equal to the amplitudes.
Chinese Simplified：每个频带的最大纹波，范围是(0,1)，长度和amplitudes相等

param.name: sampleRate
param.para: Samplerate,The unit is Hz. The default value is 2Hz.
Chinese Simplified：采样率，单位为Hz，默认为2Hz

param.name: scale
param.para: Ripple scale, default is linear scale, range is (0,1).
Chinese Simplified：纹波标度，默认是线性标度，范围是(0,1)

returns.para: Chinese Simplified：n：满足设计要求的最低滤波器阶数； wn：归一化截止频率，范围是[0,1]，其中1对应奈奎斯特频率频率fs/2； amplitudes：每个频点的幅度响应； weights：每个频带的权重，长度是bands的一半

summary.para: Use Parks-McClellan algorithm to estimate the order of the low-pass filter.
Chinese Simplified：使用Parks-McClellan算法估计低通滤波器的阶数

param.name: wp
param.para: Chinese Simplified：归一化通带边沿频率

param.name: ws
param.para: Chinese Simplified：归一化阻带边沿频率

param.name: rp
param.para: Chinese Simplified：最大通带纹波，范围是(0,1)

param.name: rs
param.para: Chinese Simplified：最大阻带纹波，范围是(0,1)

summary.para: Validate and normalize input parameters.
Chinese Simplified：验证和标准化输入参数

param.name: frequency
param.para: Chinese Simplified：单调递增的频带边沿频率

param.name: amplitude
param.para: The ideal amplitude at each frequency point.
Chinese Simplified：每个频点的理想幅度

param.name: ripple
param.para: The maximum ripple for each frequency band.
Chinese Simplified：每个频带的最大纹波

summary.para: Designing a linear-phase FIR filter with equiripple characteristics using the Parks-McClellan algorithm and Remez exchange technique results in an optimal fit between the specified frequency response and the actual frequency response, thereby minimizing the maximum error between them. In some cases, the algorithm may fail to converge, requiring verification through the frequency response. If the design is incorrect, it may be necessary to increase the filter order or reduce the design parameter requirements.
Chinese Simplified：使用Parks-McClellan算法和Remes交换技术设计具有等波纹特性的线性相位FIR滤波器， 设计结果在指定频率响应和实际频率响应之间具有最佳拟合，从而可最小化指定频率响应和实际频率响应之间的最大误差， 部分情况下算法可能无法收敛，需要通过频率响应进行验证，如果设计不正确，需要提高阶数或者降低设计参数要求

param.name: bands
param.para: Monotonically increasing band edge frequency, the range is [0, fs/2], and the length must be even.
Chinese Simplified：单调递增的频带边沿频率，范围是[0, fs/2]，长度必须是偶数

param.name: amplitudes
param.para: The ideal gain for each frequency which is equal to the length of the bands.
Chinese Simplified：每个频点的理想增益，长度和bands相等

param.name: weight
param.para: The weight vector, which emphasizes minimizing the error in certain frequency bands, has an array length equal to half the number of bands..
Chinese Simplified：权重向量，侧重地将某些频带的误差降至最低，数组长度是bands的一半

param.name: type
param.para: Filter type, multi-band Bandpass by default.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器类型，默认为多频带Bandpass

param.name: sampleRate
param.para: Samplerate,The unit is Hz. The default value is 2Hz.
Chinese Simplified：采样率，单位为Hz，默认为2Hz

param.name: griddensity
param.para: The frequency grid density, the higher the density, the closer to the ideal equal-ripple filter, but the calculation time will be increased, the default value is 16.
Chinese Simplified：频率网格密度，密度越高越接近理想的等波纹滤波器，但是会增加计算时间，默认值为16

member.name: M:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.FIRDesign.CheckFIR_PM(System.Int32,System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double[])
member.summary: 检查Parks-McClellan设计参数

member.name: M:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.FIRDesign.firgrgrid(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double[],System.Int32,System.Double[])
member.summary: Set up the grid of frequency points for the approximation on a compact subset of the interval [0, pi], called by firgr

summary.para: Design a Gaussian FIR pulse forming filter, the order sps * span of the filter must be even.
Chinese Simplified：设计高斯 FIR 脉冲成型滤波器，滤波器的阶数 sps * span 必须是偶数

param.name: bt
param.para: The product of the -3dB single-sideband bandwidth and the symbol time (in seconds), represented as bt, yields a relationship where a smaller value of bt results in a larger pulse width.
Chinese Simplified：-3dB单边带带宽和和符号时间（单位为秒）的乘积，较小的 bt 值会产生较大的脉冲宽度

param.name: span
param.para: The number of symbols. The default value is 3.

param.name: sps
param.para: The number of samples contained in each symbol period. The default value is 2.
Chinese Simplified：每个符号周期包含的样本数数，默认值为2

summary.para: Design a raised cosine or root raised cosine FIR pulse molding filter with a smooth sinusoidal transition low pass response. The order sps * span of the filter must be even, Input signal delay span / 2 symbols, that is span* sps / 2 sampling points.
Chinese Simplified：设计升余弦或根升余弦 FIR 脉冲成型滤波器，具有平滑正弦过渡的低通响应。滤波器的阶数 sps * span 必须是偶数， 输入信号延迟 span / 2个符号，也就是 span * sps / 2个采样点

param.name: sps
param.para: The number of samples per symbol period.
Chinese Simplified：每个符号周期包含的样本数

param.name: shape
param.para: The shape of the raised cosine window, which defaults to the square root.
Chinese Simplified：升余弦窗的形状，默认为平方根

summary.para: The Savitzky-Golay filter is designed to smooth noisy signals over a wide frequency range while preserving the high-frequency components of the original signal to a greater extent..
Chinese Simplified：Savitzky-Golay滤波器设计，用于在宽频带范围内平滑含噪声的信号，可以较大程度保留原始信号的高频分量

param.name: order
param.para: Polynomial order, must be less than the frame length, if the order is equal to the frame length -1, the smoothing operation is not performed.
Chinese Simplified：多项式阶数，必须小于帧长度，如果阶数等于帧长度-1，则不执行平滑操作

param.name: frameLength
param.para: The frame length， must be odd.
Chinese Simplified：帧长度，必须为奇数

param.name: weights
param.para: An array of weights，which is equal to the frame length or bigger.
Chinese Simplified：权重数组，大小等于帧长度

summary.para: Using window method to design a linear FIR filter with standard frequency band, the odd coefficient is a class I filter, and the even coefficient is a class II filter. Note: Since the frequency response of Class II filters at Nyquist frequencies is zero, this method is not used to design Class II high-pass and band-stop filters. At this point, if the coefficient is even, it is automatically added by 1, and the Class I FIR filter design is returned.
Chinese Simplified：使用加窗法设计标准频带的线性FIR滤波器，系数为奇数是 I 类滤波器，系数为偶数是 II 类滤波器， 注意：由于 II 类滤波器在奈奎斯特频率下的频率响应为零，此方法不用于设计 II 类高通和带阻滤波器， 此时如果系数为偶数则会自动加1，并返回 I 类FIR滤波器设计

param.name: n
param.para: Filter order, equal to coefficient length -1.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器阶数，等于系数长度-1

param.name: wn
param.para: The cutoff frequency has an array size of 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters. wn has the same unit as fs and ranges from 0 to 1, with 1 corresponding to the Nyquist frequency fs/2.
Chinese Simplified：截止频率，对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2。 wn与fs单位相同，范围在0~1之间，1对应于奈奎斯特频率fs/2

param.name: type
param.para: Window function type, used to reduce the ripple in the filter passband and improve the attenuation of the filter to the frequency component in the filter stopband, using Hamming Windows by default.
Chinese Simplified：窗函数类型，用于减少滤波器通带中的波纹，并改进滤波器对滤波器阻带中频率分量的衰减，默认使用汉明窗

param.name: windowParam
param.para: Window parameters, including the beta parameter of a Kaiser window, the standard deviation of a Gaussian window, or the attenuation coefficient of a Chebyshev window, default to NaN.
Chinese Simplified：窗参数，包括Kaiser窗的beta参数、高斯窗的标准差，或Chebyshev窗的衰减系数，默认值为NaN

param.name: bandType
param.para: The default filter type is a multiband filter with the first band as a passband.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器类型，默认为第一个频带为通带的多频带滤波器

param.name: scale
param.para: Whether to scale the FIR plus window filter coefficient so that the passband amplitude is 1 (0 dB).
Chinese Simplified：是否缩放FIR加窗滤波器系数，使得通带幅度为1 (0 dB)

param.name: sampleRate
param.para: Samplerate,The unit is Hz. The default value is 2Hz.
Chinese Simplified：采样率，单位为Hz，默认为2Hz

summary.para: Using frequency sampling method to design multi-band linear FIR filter, it can have arbitrary shape piecewise linear frequency response. An odd coefficient is a Class I filter, an even coefficient is a Class II filter, Note: Since the frequency response of Class II filters at Nyquist frequencies is zero, this method is not used to design Class II high-pass and band-stop filters. At this point, if the coefficient is even, it is automatically added by 1, and the Class I FIR filter design is returned.
Chinese Simplified：使用频率采样法设计多频带的线性FIR滤波器，可以具有任意形状的分段线性频率响应， 系数为奇数是 I 类滤波器，系数为偶数是 II 类滤波器， 注意：由于 II 类滤波器在奈奎斯特频率下的频率响应为零，此方法不用于设计 II 类高通和带阻滤波器， 此时如果系数为偶数则会自动加1，并返回 I 类FIR滤波器设计

param.name: n
param.para: Filter order, equal to coefficient length -1.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器阶数，等于系数长度-1

param.name: bands
param.para: Monotonically increasing band edge frequency, the range is [0, fs/2], and the length must be even.
Chinese Simplified：单调递增的频带边沿频率，范围是[0, fs/2]，长度必须是偶数

param.name: amplitudes
param.para: The ideal gain for each frequency which is equal to the length of the bands.
Chinese Simplified：每个频点的理想增益，长度和bands相等

param.name: windowType
param.para: Window function type, used to reduce the ripple in the filter passband and improve the attenuation of the filter to the frequency component in the filter stopband, using Hamming Windows by default.
Chinese Simplified：窗函数类型，用于减少滤波器通带中的波纹，并改进滤波器对滤波器阻带中频率分量的衰减，默认使用汉明窗

param.name: windowParam
param.para: Window parameters, including the beta parameter of a Kaiser window, the standard deviation of a Gaussian window, or the attenuation coefficient of a Chebyshev window, default to NaN.
Chinese Simplified：窗参数，包括Kaiser窗的beta参数、高斯窗的标准差，或Chebyshev窗的衰减系数，默认值为NaN

param.name: sampleRate
param.para: Samplerate,The unit is Hz. The default value is 2Hz.
Chinese Simplified：采样率，单位为Hz，默认为2Hz

member.name: M:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.FIRDesign.CheckFIR_Window(System.Int32,System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double)
member.summary: 检查FIR窗函数设计法的输入参数

summary.para: FIR filter band type.
Chinese Simplified：FIR滤波器频带类型
Low-pass filter.
Chinese Simplified：低通滤波器
High-pass filter.
Chinese Simplified：高通滤波器
Band-stop filter.
Chinese Simplified：带阻滤波器
Band-pass filter.
Chinese Simplified：带通滤波器
The first band is passband, low-pass or band-stop.
Chinese Simplified： 第一个频带为通带，低通或者带阻
The first band is stopband, high-pass, or bandpass.
Chinese Simplified： 第一个频带为阻带，高通或者带通
Ripple scale.
Chinese Simplified：纹波标度
Linear scale.
Chinese Simplified：线性标度
Decibel scale.
Chinese Simplified：分贝标度
Filter types.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器类型
Multiband filter, suitable for class I and class II FIR filters, if the number of taps is even (Class II filter), then the Nyquist frequency point magnitude must be 0.
Chinese Simplified： 多频带滤波器，适用于 I 类和 II 类FIR滤波器，如如抽头数为偶数（II 类滤波器），则奈奎斯特频点的幅度必须为0

Differential filters, applicable to class III FIR filters, the differentiation of the signal in the time domain is equivalent to the Fourier transform of the signal multiplied by the virtual ramp function.
Chinese Simplified： 微分滤波器，适用于 III 类FIR滤波器，信号在时域中的微分等效于信号的傅里叶变换乘以虚斜坡函数
Antisymmetric filter /Hilbert converter, suitable for odd symmetric filters, that is, even order class III filters or odd order class IV filters.
Chinese Simplified： 反对称滤波器/Hilbert 变换器，适用于奇对称滤波器，即偶数阶 III 类滤波器或者奇数阶 IV 类滤波器
Raised cosine window shape.
Chinese Simplified：升余弦窗的形状
Root raised cosine.
Chinese Simplified： 根升余弦
Raised cosine.
Chinese Simplified：升余弦
FIR filtering.
Chinese Simplified：FIR滤波
FIR filtering.
Chinese Simplified：FIR滤波
FIR filtering.
Chinese Simplified：FIR滤波
using the FFT based OverlapAdd method to filter one-dimensional input signals , which is faster than FIRFilter when the input signal is long.
Chinese Simplified：使用基于FFT的重叠相加法 (OverlapAdd) 对一维输入信号进行滤波，当输入信号较长时，此方法要比FIRFilter快
using the FFT based OverlapAdd method to filter two-dimensional input signals , which is faster than FIRFilter when the input signal is long.
Chinese Simplified：使用基于FFT的重叠相加法 (OverlapAdd) 对二维输入信号进行滤波，当输入信号较长时，此方法要比FIRFilter快

param.name: b
param.para: The filter coefficient, the number of columns, is equal to the number of columns of the input signal, and the coefficient of each column filters the input signal by column.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器系数，列数和输入信号的列数相等，每一列的系数对输入信号按列滤波

param.name: x
param.para: Two-dimensional input signals, channels arranged in columns, the number of columns equal to the number of columns in the filter coefficient array.
Chinese Simplified：二维输入信号，通道按列排列，列数和滤波器系数数组的列数相等

summary.para: Using a direct FIR filter specified by FIR coefficient to filter the input signal .
Chinese Simplified：使用FIR系数指定的直接型FIR滤波器，对输入信号进行滤波
Using a direct FIR filter specified by FIR coefficient to filter the multichannel input signal .
Chinese Simplified：使用FIR系数指定的直接型FIR滤波器，对多通道输入信号进行滤波

param.name: x
param.para: Multi-channel input signals, channels arranged in columns.
Chinese Simplified：多通道输入信号，通道按列排列

summary.para: using a FIR filter to filter the input sequence .
Chinese Simplified：使用FIR滤波器对输入序列进行滤波

param.name: z
param.para: The initial conditions for the filter delay, where the array size is equal to the length of b.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器延迟的初始条件，数组大小等于b的长度

summary.para: using a FIR filter to filter the input sequence .
Chinese Simplified：使用FIR滤波器对输入序列进行滤波

param.name: z
param.para: The initial conditions for the filter delay, where the array size is equal to the length of b.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器延迟的初始条件，数组大小等于b的长度

summary.para: IIR filter design.
Chinese Simplified：IIR滤波器设计
IIR filter design.
Chinese Simplified：IIR滤波器设计
IIR filter design.
Chinese Simplified：IIR滤波器设计

Chinese Simplified：IIR滤波器设计
IIR filter design.

IIR filter design.

IIR filter design.
Chinese Simplified：IIR滤波器设计
Butterworth digital filter design.
Chinese Simplified：巴特沃斯数字滤波器设计

param.name: wn
param.para: The cutoff frequency, defined as the frequency at which the filter amplitude response is 1 / sqrt(2), is in the range [0, fs/2], and the array size is 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters.
Chinese Simplified：截止频率，定义为滤波器幅值响应为 1 / sqrt(2) 时的频率，范围是[0, fs/2]， 对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2

param.name: bandType
param.para: The filter type, which defaults to low-pass, is twice the order of the low-pass type when the type is bandpass or bandstop.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器类型，默认为低通，当类型为带通或者带阻时阶数会变为低通类型的两倍

summary.para: Chebyshev type I digital filter design.
Chinese Simplified：切比雪夫I型数字滤波器设计

param.name: wp
param.para: The cutoff frequency, defined as the frequency at which the filter amplitude response is -rp dB, is in the range [0, fs/2], and the array size is 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters.
Chinese Simplified：通带截止频率，定义为滤波器幅值响应为 -rp dB 时的频率，范围是[0, fs/2]， 对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2

param.name: rp
param.para: Peak-to-peak ripple of the pass band, in dB. The smaller the ripple, the wider the transition band of the filter. The default value is 0.1dB.
Chinese Simplified：通带的峰峰值纹波，单位为dB，纹波越小，滤波器的过渡带越宽，默认值为0.1dB

param.name: bandType
param.para: The filter type, which defaults to low-pass, is twice the order of the low-pass type when the type is bandpass or bandstop.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器类型，默认为低通，当类型为带通或者带阻时阶数会变为低通类型的两倍

summary.para: Chebyshev type II digital filter design.
Chinese Simplified：切比雪夫II型数字滤波器设计

param.name: ws
param.para: The cutoff frequency, defined as the frequency at which the filter amplitude response is -rs dB, is in the range [0, fs/2], and the array size is 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters.
Chinese Simplified：通带截止频率，定义为滤波器幅值响应为 -rs dB 时的频率，范围是[0, fs/2]， 对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2

param.name: rs
param.para: Peak-to-peak ripple of the pass band, in dB. The smaller the ripple, the wider the transition band of the filter. The default value is 0.1dB.
Chinese Simplified：通带的峰峰值纹波，单位为dB，纹波越小，滤波器的过渡带越宽，默认值为0.1dB

param.name: bandType
param.para: The filter type, which defaults to low-pass, is twice the order of the low-pass type when the type is bandpass or bandstop.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器类型，默认为低通，当类型为带通或者带阻时阶数会变为低通类型的两倍

summary.para: Elliptic digital filter design.
Chinese Simplified：椭圆数字滤波器设计

param.name: wp
param.para: The cutoff frequency, defined as the frequency at which the filter amplitude response is -rp dB, is in the range [0, fs/2], and the array size is 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters.
Chinese Simplified：通带截止频率，定义为滤波器幅值响应为 -rp dB 时的频率，范围是[0, fs/2]， 对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2

param.name: rp
param.para: Peak-to-peak ripple of the pass band, in dB. The smaller the ripple, the wider the transition band of the filter. The default value is 0.1dB.
Chinese Simplified：通带的峰峰值纹波，单位为dB，纹波越小，滤波器的过渡带越宽，默认值为0.1dB

param.name: rs
param.para: Stopband attenuation downward from the maximum passband. The greater the attenuation, the wider the transition band of the filter. The unit is dB, and the default value is 60dB.
Chinese Simplified：从通带最大值处向下的阻带衰减，衰减越大，滤波器的过渡带越宽，单位为dB，默认为60dB

param.name: bandType
param.para: The filter type, which defaults to low-pass, is twice the order of the low-pass type when the type is bandpass or bandstop.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器类型，默认为低通，当类型为带通或者带阻时阶数会变为低通类型的两倍

summary.para: Calculate the zeros, poles, and gains of the prototype of the Bessel analog low-pass filter of order N.
Chinese Simplified：计算N阶贝塞尔模拟低通滤波器原型的零点、极点和增益
Estimate the order of the IIR filter and the corresponding cutoff frequency.
Chinese Simplified：预估IIR滤波器的阶数和对应的截止频率

param.name: wp
param.para: The passband edge frequency has an array size of 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters. For digital filters, wp is the same unit as fs and ranges from 0 to 1, with 1 corresponding to the Nyquist frequency fs/2. For analog filters, wp is the angular frequency in rad/s.
Chinese Simplified：通带边沿频率，对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2。 对于数字滤波器，wp与fs单位相同，范围在0~1之间，1对应于奈奎斯特频率fs/2。 对于模拟滤波器，wp是角频率，单位为rad/s

param.name: ws
param.para: The stopband edge frequency has the same constraints as specified for wp.
Chinese Simplified：阻带边沿频率，限制与wp说明相同

param.name: gpass
param.para: The maximum chase with ripple is measured in dB.
Chinese Simplified：最大通带纹波，单位为dB

param.name: gstop
param.para: Chinese Simplified：最大阻带纹波，单位为dB

param.name: designMethod
param.para: Filter design method, default is Butterworth.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器设计方法，默认为巴特沃斯

returns.para: z, the lowest order of the filter satisfying the design parameters. wn, 3dB cutoff frequencies, low-pass and high-pass return a single cutoff frequency, and band-pass and band-stop return a set of cutoff frequencies
Chinese Simplified：z，满足设计参数的滤波器最低阶数 wn，3dB截止频率，低通和高通返回单个截止频率，带通和带阻返回一组截止频率

Chinese Simplified：根据给定的截止频率和纹波，设计满足要求的最低阶数的IIR数字滤波器(不适用于贝塞尔滤波器）

param.name: wp
param.para: The passband edge frequency has an array size of 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters. For digital filters, wp is the same unit as fs and ranges from 0 to 1, with 1 corresponding to the Nyquist frequency fs/2. For analog filters, wp is the angular frequency in rad/s.
Chinese Simplified：通带边沿频率，对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2。 对于数字滤波器，wp与fs单位相同，范围在0~1之间，1对应于奈奎斯特频率fs/2。 对于模拟滤波器，wp是角频率，单位为rad/s

param.name: ws
param.para: The stopband edge frequency has the same constraints as specified for wp.
Chinese Simplified：阻带边沿频率，限制与wp说明相同

param.name: rp
param.para: The maximum chase with ripple is measured in dB.
Chinese Simplified：最大通带纹波，单位为dB

param.name: rs
param.para: Chinese Simplified：最大阻带纹波，单位为dB

param.name: designMethod
param.para: Filter design method, default is Butterworth.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器设计方法，默认为巴特沃斯

summary.para: Designing an IIR digital filter of the minimum order that fulfills the requirements based on the given cutoff frequency and ripple specifications, with the exception that Bessel filters are not suitable for this purpose..
Chinese Simplified：根据给定的截止频率和纹波，设计满足要求的最低阶数的IIR数字滤波器(不适用于贝塞尔滤波器）

param.name: wp
param.para: The passband edge frequency has an array size of 1 for low-pass and high-pass filters and 2 for band-pass and band-stop filters. For digital filters, wp is the same unit as fs and ranges from 0 to 1, with 1 corresponding to the Nyquist frequency fs/2. For analog filters, wp is the angular frequency in rad/s.
Chinese Simplified：通带边沿频率，对于低通和高通滤波器，数组大小为1，对于带通和带阻滤波器，数组大小为2。 对于数字滤波器，wp与fs单位相同，范围在0~1之间，1对应于奈奎斯特频率fs/2。 对于模拟滤波器，wp是角频率，单位为rad/s

param.name: ws
param.para: The stopband edge frequency has the same constraints as specified for wp.
Chinese Simplified：阻带边沿频率，限制与wp说明相同

param.para: Chinese Simplified：最大阻带纹波，单位为dB

param.name: designMethod
param.para: Filter design method, default is Butterworth.

summary.para: Designing an IIR digital filter of the minimum order that fulfills the requirements based on the given cutoff frequency and ripple specifications, with the exception that Bessel filters are not suitable for this purpose..
Chinese Simplified：根据给定的截止频率和纹波，设计满足要求的最低阶数的IIR数字滤波器(不适用于贝塞尔滤波器）

The input signal is filtered using a direct type II IIR filter based on the difference equation method.

The input signal is filtered using a direct type II IIR filter based on the difference equation method.
Chinese Simplified：使用基于差分方程法的直接II型IIR滤波器对输入信号进行滤波

param.name: x
param.para: Multi-channel input signal, the channels are arranged in columns.
Chinese Simplified：多通道输入信号，通道按列排列

summary.para: The input sequence is filtered using a direct type II IIR filter, which is equivalent to a FIR filter when the reverse coefficient is null.
Chinese Simplified：使用直接II型IIR滤波器对输入序列进行滤波，反向系数为空时等效于FIR滤波器

param.name: z
param.para: The initial conditions for the filter delay, where the array size is equal to the maximum of the lengths of b and a -1.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器延迟的初始条件，数组大小等于b和a长度的最大值-1

returns.para: The final conditions of the filtered sequence and the filter delay
Chinese Simplified：滤波后序列和滤波器延迟的最终条件

summary.para: Constructing the initial conditions for a transposed direct-form II filter based on given past inputs and outputs..
Chinese Simplified：针对给定的过去的输入和输出构建转置的直接II型滤波器的初始条件

param.name: ypast
param.para: The past output, the length is the denominator coefficient length -1.
Chinese Simplified：过去的输出，长度是分母系数长度-1

param.name: xpast
param.para: Past input, length is the numerator coefficient length -1, if null means past input is 0.
Chinese Simplified：过去的输入，长度是分子系数长度-1，如果为null代表过去输入为0

returns.para: Initial conditions for the filter delay.
Chinese Simplified：滤波器延迟的初始条件

summary.para: Build the initial state of the step steady-state response of the IIR filter so that the output of the filter starts at the same value as the first element of the signal to be filtered.
Chinese Simplified：构建IIR滤波器的阶跃稳态响应的初始状态，以便滤波器的输出从与要滤波的信号的第一个元素相同的值开始

是否重置滤波器内部状态，在第一次调用时可以设置为true

summary.para: Smooth filtering of the input sequence, including moving average FIR filter or exponential average IIR filter.
Chinese Simplified：对输入序列进行平滑滤波，包括移动平均FIR滤波器或指数平均IIR滤波器

param.name: halfWidth
param.para: Half width of the moving average filter, in sample, full width =2*halfWidth+1.
Chinese Simplified：移动平均滤波器的半宽，以采样为单位，全宽=2*halfWidth+1

param.name: shape
param.para: The shape of the moving average filter.
Chinese Simplified：移动平均滤波器的形状

param.name: timeConstant
param.para: Specify the time constant for the exponentially weighted filter in seconds..
Chinese Simplified：指定指数加权滤波器的时间常量，以秒为单位

summary.para: A cascaded second-order filter is used to filter the single-channel signal, and the architecture is a transposed Direct Form II type, which is used to reduce the numerical accuracy error of the high-order filter.
Chinese Simplified：使用级联的二阶滤波器对单通道信号进行滤波，架构是转置的Direct Form II型，用于降低高阶次滤波器的数值精度误差

param.name: sos
param.para: Second-order filter coefficient array, array size is [number of cascades,6], each row represents a second-order filter, The first three columns represent the numerator coefficients, the last three columns represent the denominator coefficients.
Chinese Simplified：二阶滤波器系数数组，数组大小为[级联数,6]，每一行代表一级二阶滤波器， 前三列代表分子系数，后三列代表分母系数

summary.para: A cascaded second-order filter is used to filter the single-channel signal, and the architecture is a transposed Direct Form II type, which is used to reduce the numerical accuracy error of the high-order filter.
Chinese Simplified：使用级联的二阶滤波器对单通道信号进行滤波，架构是转置的Direct Form II型，用于降低高阶次滤波器的数值精度误差

param.name: sos
param.para: Second-order filter coefficient array, array size is [number of cascades,6], each row represents a second-order filter, The first three columns represent the numerator coefficients, the last three columns represent the denominator coefficients.
Chinese Simplified：二阶滤波器系数数组，数组大小为[级联数,6]，每一行代表一级二阶滤波器， 前三列代表分子系数，后三列代表分母系数

summary.para: A cascaded second-order filter is used to filter the single-channel signal, and the architecture is a transposed Direct Form II type, which is used to reduce the numerical accuracy error of the high-order filter.
Chinese Simplified：使用级联的二阶滤波器对单通道信号进行滤波，架构是转置的Direct Form II型，用于降低高阶次滤波器的数值精度误差

param.name: sos
param.para: Second-order filter coefficient array, array size is [number of cascades,6], each row represents a second-order filter, The first three columns represent the numerator coefficients, the last three columns represent the denominator coefficients.
Chinese Simplified：二阶滤波器系数数组，数组大小为[级联数,6]，每一行代表一级二阶滤波器， 前三列代表分子系数，后三列代表分母系数

param.name: zi

member.name: M:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.IIRFiltering.CheckSOS(System.Double[0:,0:])
member.summary: 检查二阶滤波器系数数组

summary.para: Apply both forward and reverse filtering to the input signal, resulting in a filtered signal that exhibits no phase delay compared to the original signal, and has eliminated transient effects at both ends.
Chinese Simplified：对输入信号进行正向和反向滤波，滤波后信号和原信号没有相位延迟，已经消除两端瞬态效应

param.name: padType
param.para: Continuation type, default is an odd continuation.
Chinese Simplified：延拓类型，默认为奇延拓

param.name: padLength
param.para: The number of leading and trailing elements must be less than the length of x minus 1.
Chinese Simplified：首尾延拓元素的个数，必须小于x的长度-1

summary.para: "Apply forward and backward filtering to the input sequence using cascaded second-order filters, resulting in a filtered signal that exhibits no phase delay compared to the original signal, and has eliminated transient effects at both ends.
Chinese Simplified：使用级联的二阶滤波器对输入序列进行前后向滤波，滤波后信号和原信号没有相位延迟，已经消除两端瞬态效应

param.name: sos
param.para: An array of second-order filter coefficients with a size of [number of cascades, 6], where each row represents one stage of the second-order filter. The first three columns represent the numerator coefficients, and the last three columns represent the denominator coefficients.
Chinese Simplified：二阶滤波器系数数组，数组大小为[级联数,6]，每一行代表一级二阶滤波器， 前三列代表分子系数，后三列代表分母系数

param.name: padType
param.para: Continuation type, default is an odd continuation.
Chinese Simplified：延拓类型，默认为奇延拓

param.name: padLength
param.para: The number of leading and trailing elements must be less than the length of x minus 1.
Chinese Simplified：首尾延拓元素的个数，必须小于x的长度-1

member.summary: 检查零相位滤波器的延拓参数

summary.para: Type of smoothing filter.
Chinese Simplified：平滑滤波器的类型

member.name: F:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.SmoothingType.MovingAverage
member.summary: 移动平均

member.name: F:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.SmoothingType.Exponential
member.summary: 指数

summary.para: Shape of the moving average filter.
Chinese Simplified：移动平均滤波器的形状
All samples in the moving average window have the same weight in computing each smoothed output sample.
Chinese Simplified：移动平均窗中的所有采样在计算每个平滑输出采样时有相同的权值
The moving weighted window applied to sampling is triangular in shape, with the peak appearing in the middle of the window and a symmetric oblique descent on both sides.
Chinese Simplified：应用于采样的移动加权窗是三角形的，峰值出现在窗中间，两边对称斜向下降
Types of Extension.
Chinese Simplified：延拓类型

member.name: F:SeeSharpTools.JY.DSP.Utility.Filter1D.PadType.None
member.summary: 不扩展

summary.para: Odd symmetric extension.
Chinese Simplified：奇对称延拓
Even symmetric extension.
Chinese Simplified：偶对称延拓
Constant extension.
Chinese Simplified：常数延拓

Multisample rate signal processing involves resampling uniform or non-uniform data to a new fixed rate. This process involves decimation and linear interpolation or higher-order interpolation, all without introducing aliasing.
Chinese Simplified：多采样率信号处理，将均匀或非均匀数据重采样为新固定速率。执行抽取和线性插值或更高阶插值，而不引入混叠

Multisample rate signal processing involves resampling uniform or non-uniform data to a new fixed rate. This process involves decimation and linear interpolation or higher-order interpolation, all without introducing aliasing.
Chinese Simplified：多采样率信号处理，将均匀或非均匀数据重采样为新固定速率。执行抽取和线性插值或更高阶插值，而不引入混叠
To specify the frequencies and gains using band-limited interpolation, and then design a band-limited linear FIR filter using the least squares method..
Chinese Simplified：使用带限插值法指定频率和增益，然后使用最小二乘法设计带限的线性FIR滤波器

param.name: r
param.para: Interpolation points, filtering a signal with r-1 zeros occurring for every r samples.
Chinese Simplified：插值点数，对每r个样本出现r-1个0的信号进行滤波

param.name: p
param.para: Non-zero number, using the nearest 2*p sampling points.
Chinese Simplified：非零点数，使用最近的2*p个采样点

param.name: alpha
param.para: The multiple of the original signal bandwidth relative to the Nyquist frequency.
Chinese Simplified：原始信号带宽相对奈奎斯特频率的倍数

summary.para: Apply the Lagrange polynomial interpolation method to design a band-limited linear FIR filter, which is a nonlinear FIR filter when r and n are both even.
Chinese Simplified：使用拉格朗日多项式插值法设计带限的线性FIR滤波器，当r和n都为偶数时是非线性FIR滤波器

param.name: r
param.para: Interpolation points, performing polynomial interpolation on a sequence where r-1 zeros occur for every r samples.
Chinese Simplified：插值点数，对每r个样本出现r-1个0的序列进行多项式内插

param.name: n
param.para: Lagrange polynomial order, when n is even the length of the coefficient is length (n+1)*r, When n is odd, the length of the coefficient is length(n+1)*r-1.
Chinese Simplified：拉格朗日多项式阶数，当n为偶数时系数长度是length (n+1)*r， 当n为奇数是系数长度是length (n+1)*r-1

summary.para: Zeros are inserted in the input sequence by an upsampling factor.
Chinese Simplified：通过升采样因子在输入序列中插入零

param.name: upsamplingFactor
param.para: The upsamplingFactor, which inserts the upsamplingfactor -1 zeros between two adjacent sampling points.
Chinese Simplified：升采样因子，在相邻两个采样点之间插入upsamplingFactor-1个0

param.name: offset
param.para: The offset, which must be greater than or equal to 0 and less than the upsampling factor.
Chinese Simplified：偏移量，必须大于等于0并且小于升采样因子

returns.para: The upsampled array of the output.
Chinese Simplified：输出的升采样数组

summary.para: Downsampled the input sequence by a downsampling factor.
Chinese Simplified：通过降采样因子对输入序列进行降采样

param.name: downsamplingFactor
param.para: The down-sampling factor, must be greater than 0.
Chinese Simplified：降采样因子，必须大于0

param.name: offset
param.para: The offset, which must be greater than or equal to 0 and less than the upsampling factor.
Chinese Simplified：偏移量，必须大于等于0并且小于升采样因子

returns.para: Chinese Simplified：输出的降采样数组

summary.para: The multichannel input signal is first upsampled using a multiphase interpolator, then FIR filtering is performed, and finally downsampling is performed.
Chinese Simplified：使用多相插值器对多通道输入信号先进行升采样，然后执行FIR滤波，最后进行降采样

param.name: x
param.para: Multi-channel input signal, the channels are arranged in columns.
Chinese Simplified：多通道输入信号，通道按列排列

param.name: h
param.para: Impulse response of multichannel filter,Channels are arranged in columns.
Chinese Simplified：多通道滤波器的冲激响应，通道按列排列

returns.para: Output signal, the number of columns equals the number of signal channels, the number of rows equals ceil(((length(x)-1)*p+length(h))/q).
Chinese Simplified：输出信号，列数等于信号通道数，行数等于 ceil(((length(x)-1)*p+length(h))/q)

summary.para: The multichannel input signal is first upsampled using a multiphase interpolator, then FIR filtering is performed, and finally downsampling is performed.
Chinese Simplified：使用多相插值器对多通道输入信号先进行升采样，然后执行FIR滤波，最后进行降采样

param.name: x
param.para: Multi-channel input signal, the channels are arranged in columns.
Chinese Simplified：多通道输入信号，通道按列排列

param.name: h
param.para: Impulse response of multichannel filter,Channels are arranged in columns.
Chinese Simplified：多通道滤波器的冲激响应，通道按列排列

returns.para: Output signal, the number of columns equals the number of signal channels, the number of rows equals ceil(((length(x)-1)*p+length(h))/q).
Chinese Simplified：输出信号，列数等于信号通道数，行数等于 ceil(((length(x)-1)*p+length(h))/q)

summary.para: To uniformly resample the input signal, an FIR low-pass anti-aliasing filter is designed using the least squares method, and a Kaiser window is applied. Finally, polyphase filtering is performed..
Chinese Simplified：对输入信号进行均匀重采样，使用最小二乘法设计FIR低通抗混叠滤波器，并施加Kaiser窗，最后进行多相滤波

param.name: n
param.para: Control the relative length of the anti-aliasing filter, the filter order is equal to 2 × n × max(p,q).
Chinese Simplified：控制抗混叠滤波器的相对长度，滤波器阶数等于2 × n × max(p,q)

param.name: beta
param.para: The Kaiser window parameter, which determines the amount of smoothing performed by the filter, and larger beta values indicate a greater smoothing processing, is suitable for signals with transient or significant noise.
Chinese Simplified：Kaiser窗参数，决定滤波器执行的平滑量，更大的 beta 值表示具有更大的平滑处理，适用于具有瞬变或显著噪声的信号

summary.para: To uniformly resample the input signal, an FIR low-pass anti-aliasing filter is designed using the least squares method, and a Kaiser window is applied. Finally, polyphase filtering is performed..
Chinese Simplified：对输入信号进行均匀重采样，使用最小二乘法设计FIR低通抗混叠滤波器，并施加Kaiser窗，最后进行多相滤波

param.name: x
param.para: Multi-channel input signal, the channels are arranged in columns.
Chinese Simplified：多通道输入信号，通道按列排列

param.name: n
param.para: Control the relative length of the anti-aliasing filter, the filter order is equal to 2 × n × max(p,q).
Chinese Simplified：控制抗混叠滤波器的相对长度，滤波器阶数等于2 × n × max(p,q)

param.name: beta
param.para: The Kaiser window parameter, which determines the amount of smoothing performed by the filter, and larger beta values indicate a greater smoothing processing, is suitable for signals with transient or significant noise.
Chinese Simplified：Kaiser窗参数，决定滤波器执行的平滑量，更大的 beta 值表示具有更大的平滑处理，适用于具有瞬变或显著噪声的信号

summary.para: Based on the decimation factor, the original signal is resampled at a lower sampling rate after being passed through an anti-aliasing low-pass filter. By default, an 8th-order Chebyshev Type I low-pass filter is used, with a normalized cutoff frequency of 0.8 divided by the decimation factor, and a passband ripple of 0.05dB. The IIR filtering type is set to zero-phase filtering to eliminate phase distortion. If the filter type is selected as FIR, a default 30th-order FIR windowed filter is used, with a cutoff frequency of 1 divided by the decimation factor.After filtering, a time shift is applied to the signal to compensate for the delay introduced by the FIR filter.
Chinese Simplified：根据抽取因子使用较低的采样率对原信号在抗混叠低通滤波后进行重采样，默认使用8阶切比雪夫I型低通滤波器，归一化截止频率为0.8/抽取因子，通带平坦度0.05dB。 IIR滤波类型为零相位滤波，消除相位失真。 如果滤波器类型选择FIR，默认使用30阶FIR加窗滤波器，截止频率为1/抽取因子。滤波后会对信号进行时移处理来补偿FIR滤波器延迟。

param.name: deciFactor
param.para: Decimate factor, if greater than 13, it is recommended to call decimate multiple times instead of extracting all at once.
Chinese Simplified：抽取因子，如果大于13，建议多次调用Decimate方法而不是一次性抽取

param.name: filterType
param.para: Anti-aliasing filter type, default is IIR.
Chinese Simplified：抗混叠滤波器类型，默认为IIR

param.name: order
param.para: Chinese Simplified：滤波器阶数，为0使用默认阶数

summary.para: Based on the interpolation factor, the original signal is upsampled to a higher sampling rate and then passed through a low-pass filter.
Chinese Simplified：根据插值因子使用较高的采样率对原信号在升采样后进行低通滤波
Computes rational fraction approximations of input values.
Chinese Simplified：计算输入值的有理分式近似

param.name: x
param.para: The floating point number of the input

summary.para: Window functions for filter and spectrum analysis, where symmetric coefficients are used for filter design and asymmetric coefficients for spectrum analysis.
Chinese Simplified：用于滤波器和频谱分析的窗函数，其中对称系数用于滤波器设计，非对称系数用于频谱分析
Gets the window function coefficient for the specified length and type.
Chinese Simplified：获取指定长度和类型的窗函数系数

param.name: windowParam
param.para: Window parameters, suitable for Kasier Windows, Gaussian Windows and Chebyshev Windows.
Chinese Simplified：窗参数，适用于Kasier窗、高斯窗和切比雪夫窗

param.name: symmetric
param.para: Whether the window coefficients are symmetric, symmetric coefficients are used for filter design and asymmetric coefficients are used for spectrum analysis.
Chinese Simplified：窗系数是否对称，对称系数用于滤波器设计，非对称系数用于频谱分析
